Lanuages/bjornomics.title: Bjornomics
Lanuages/bjornomics.content: Gifstadian is a **Teutonic language** originating in Gifstad. It was the most spoken language in the world in SL1 and SL2. It has many dialects in nations such as the The United Realms (UR for short), Anglion and Vinna Tyaja and Columbia. The Gifstadian language also has dialects in territories under Gifstad proper such as Nordvik and Fjordheim.

sidebarFields.label: Countries that spoke it
sidebarFields.value: The Commonwealth of Gifstad, United Realms, Anglion, Vinna Tyaja, Columbia

sidebarFields.label: Dialects
sidebarFields.value: Nordvikian, Fjordheimic, Anglion and VT dialects

Countries/united-kingdom-of-great-anglio.title: United Kingdom of Great Anglion
Countries/united-kingdom-of-great-anglio.content: United Kingdom of Great Anglion is the island nation between continents of Varna and Karyma. It is geographically considered inside the continent of Varna but more specifically North Varna [not to be confused with the north varna pact]. Unlike what most think, Anglion is actually not a continuation of Angland, while sharing the same name in the first 2 weeks of SL2, both nations are two different monarchies ruled by different dynasties and looking over different ethnic groups of people.
